claim_boundary: This preflight is read-only. It does not push, merge, publish, or mutate GitHub. A remote update still requires explicit human R4 approval.

commands.post_push_verify: git fetch origin && git rev-parse HEAD origin/codex/create-architecture-definition-document-for-hybrid-ai origin/main

pending_remote_updates.rollback: restore feature to previous remote SHA d22c5fe0d20c0be531a3357d1d8d72dafd58dc2e with an approved restore action

pending_remote_updates.action: fast-forward push current HEAD to main
pending_remote_updates.rollback: restore main to previous remote SHA 6342d5b953b0c437761e1cab51f078c329b662bc with an approved revert/restore action

r4_disclosure.action: push current HEAD to feature; fast-forward push current HEAD to main
r4_disclosure.impact: GitHub pending refs become externally visible at the local development state.
r4_disclosure.risk: Main CI and external reviewers immediately see the current commits.
r4_disclosure.rollback: restore feature to previous remote SHA d22c5fe0d20c0be531a3357d1d8d72dafd58dc2e with an approved restore action; restore main to previous remote SHA 6342d5b953b0c437761e1cab51f078c329b662bc with an approved revert/restore action
r4_disclosure.verification: fetch origin and compare remote feature/main refs with local HEAD after push
